positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of cosmic forest flora. Intricate silhouettes of glowing mushroom clusters, delicate bioluminescent vines, and strange crystalline leaves hang from unseen branches. The style should be 'Art Nouveau meets Sci-Fi,' using deep indigos, vibrant teal accents, and glowing emerald highlights against a near-black background. Emphasize strong, clean outlines and contrast. The composition must be centralized and highly scalable for textile printing, ensuring no complex gradients or overly busy areas that lose contrast. Concept art, flat design aesthetic, vector illustration quality, high detail, poster-quality print.
